name: powerpoint-mcp
description: Manipulate live, open PowerPoint presentations via Office.js — add shapes, text, images, and more to open presentations in real time.
long_description:
PowerPoint MCP lets Claude control live, open PowerPoint presentations on macOS through Office.js APIs. Unlike file-based solutions, this extension manipulates the presentation in real time.

**Capabilities:**
- Add and modify shapes, text boxes, tables, and images
- Read slide structure and content
- Take visual screenshots of slides
- Copy slides between presentations
- Execute arbitrary Office.js code

**How it works:**
The extension runs a local bridge server that connects to a PowerPoint add-in via WebSocket. On first launch, the add-in is automatically installed into PowerPoint.

**Requirements:** Microsoft PowerPoint for Mac (16.96+), macOS.

tools.name: list_presentations
tools.description: List all connected PowerPoint presentations

tools.name: inspect_deck
tools.description: Deck overview: slide dimensions, theme (colors + fonts), and all slides with layout and shape count

tools.name: inspect_layouts
tools.description: Slide layouts with names, types, placeholders, and positions. Supports field selection.

tools.name: inspect_slide
tools.description: Detailed slide inspector: shapes with text, positions, sizes, and fills

tools.name: scan_slide
tools.description: Lightweight shape scanner: IDs, types, and positions

tools.name: screenshot_slide
tools.description: Capture a slide as a PNG screenshot

tools.name: preview_deck
tools.description: Batch overview of all/selected slides with optional thumbnails and text

tools.name: get_local_copy
tools.description: Export presentation to a local file path

tools.name: copy_slides
tools.description: Copy slides between open presentations

tools.name: insert_image
tools.description: Insert an image onto a slide

tools.name: duplicate_slide
tools.description: Duplicate a slide within the same presentation

tools.name: verify_slides
tools.description: Run programmatic checks on a slide (overlap, bounds, empty text, tiny shapes)

tools.name: read_deck_text
tools.description: Lightweight text extractor: slide titles and body as plain strings (~20x smaller than inspect_slide)

tools.name: read_shape_paragraphs
tools.description: Read raw OOXML paragraphs from a shape's text body

tools.name: edit_shape_paragraphs
tools.description: Replace paragraph content of a shape with raw OOXML

tools.name: read_slide_xml
tools.description: Read the full raw OOXML of a slide or a specific shape

tools.name: edit_slide_xml
tools.description: Edit slide XML and reimport (xml or code mode)

tools.name: read_slide_zip
tools.description: Read multiple files from the exported slide zip

tools.name: edit_slide_zip
tools.description: Update multiple files in the slide zip and reimport

tools.name: edit_slide_chart
tools.description: Create a chart on a slide from structured data

tools.name: search_text
tools.description: Search for text across all slides in the presentation

tools.name: format_shapes
tools.description: Apply formatting to multiple shapes on a slide in one call

tools.name: execute_officejs
tools.description: Execute arbitrary Office.js code in the live presentation

tools.name: search_fluent_icons
tools.description: Search Microsoft Fluent UI icons by keyword
